funds.text_content:
AMC: Groww Mutual Fund
Exit Load: Not specified
Lock-in Period: 3 Years (ELSS - Tax Saver Fund)
Minimum SIP: ₹500

chunks.content: managed by Groww Mutual Fund
The exit load for None is Not specified. Exit load is the fee charged when you redeem your units before a specified period.

The lock-in period for None is 3 Years (ELSS - Tax Saver Fund). ELSS (Equity Linked Savings Scheme) funds have a mandatory 3-year lock-in period. They offer tax benefits under Section 80C up to ₹1,50,000 per year.
The minimum SIP amount for None is ₹500. SIP (Systematic Investment Plan) allows you to invest a fixed amount regularly.

help_pages.title: Help & Support

elss_info.description: ELSS (Equity Linked Savings Scheme) funds have a mandatory lock-in period of 3 years. They offer tax benefits under Section 80C of the Income Tax Act.

exit_load_info.description: Exit load is a fee charged when you redeem (sell) your mutual fund units before a specified period.
common_rules: Most equity funds charge 1% exit load if redeemed within 1 year
Liquid funds typically have no exit load after 7 days
ELSS funds have no exit load after the 3-year lock-in period
Exit load varies by fund - always check the specific fund details

help_pages.text_content:
Topic: Help & Support

ELSS Information:
Lock-in Period: 3 Years
Tax Benefit: Deduction under Section 80C up to ₹1,50,000
ELSS (Equity Linked Savings Scheme) funds have a mandatory lock-in period of 3 years. They offer tax benefits under Section 80C of the Income Tax Act.

Exit Load Information:
Exit load is a fee charged when you redeem (sell) your mutual fund units before a specified period.
Most equity funds charge 1% exit load if redeemed within 1 year
Liquid funds typically have no exit load after 7 days
ELSS funds have no exit load after the 3-year lock-in period
Exit load varies by fund - always check the specific fund details

chunks.content: Topic: Help & Support  ELSS Information: Lock-in Period: 3 Years Tax Benefit: Deduction under Section 80C up to ₹1,50,000 ELSS (Equity Linked Savings Scheme) funds have a mandatory lock-in period of 3 years. They offer tax benefits under Section 80C of the Income Tax Act.  Exit Load Information: Exit load is a fee charged when you redeem (sell) your mutual fund units before a specified period.

Most equity funds charge 1% exit load if redeemed within 1 year Liquid funds typically have no exit load after 7 days ELSS funds have no exit load after the 3-year lock-in period Exit load varies by fund - always check the specific fund details.

ELSS (Equity Linked Savings Scheme) Information:
Lock-in Period: 3 Years
Tax Benefit: Deduction under Section 80C up to ₹1,50,000
ELSS (Equity Linked Savings Scheme) funds have a mandatory lock-in period of 3 years. They offer tax benefits under Section 80C of the Income Tax Act.

Exit Load Information:
Exit load is a fee charged when you redeem (sell) your mutual fund units before a specified period.

Common Exit Load Rules:
- Most equity funds charge 1% exit load if redeemed within 1 year
- Liquid funds typically have no exit load after 7 days
- ELSS funds have no exit load after the 3-year lock-in period
- Exit load varies by fund - always check the specific fund details
Topic: Help & Support

help_pages.title: Help & Support

download_steps: Go to Groww app or website

help_pages.text_content:
Topic: Help & Support

Capital Gains Information:
How to download capital gains statement:
Go to Groww app or website
Navigate to 'Reports' section
Select 'Capital Gains Statement'
Choose the financial year
Click 'Download' to get the statement

chunks.content:
Topic: Help & Support

Capital Gains Information:
How to download capital gains statement:
Go to Groww app or website
Navigate to 'Reports' section
Select 'Capital Gains Statement'
Choose the financial year
Click 'Download' to get the statement

How to download capital gains statement from Groww:
Go to Groww app or website
Navigate to 'Reports' section
Select 'Capital Gains Statement'
Choose the financial year
Click 'Download' to get the statement
